notes: Cataloged from lyrics provided. Structure: Chorus → Verse 1 → Chorus → Verse 2 → Chorus. Heavy use of medical/emergency imagery (cardiac arrest, CPR, defibrillator, flatline, hospice, rigamortis) as extended metaphor for his rap dominance. Pop culture references: Goku (Dragon Ball Z), Clark Kent/Superman, Rick and Morty, Malcolm X, Sadam Hussein. Tonally distinct from Forgive Me — this is a competitive brag track, not confessional.
